## Project Submission

Copy and complete the fields below. For formatting rules and category values, see `docs/repository-entry-format.md`.

- Description:
- Category:
- Language:
- Framework:

- Madagascar relevance:
- Notes:

## Submission Checklist

- [ ] The repository is public.
- [ ] The project is open source.
- [ ] The category matches the canonical category slugs.
- [ ] The status matches the allowed status values.
- [ ] The Madagascar relevance is explicit and concrete.
- [ ] The project is not already listed in the repository.
